swd.screen.config.title: Simple World Downloader Hoʻonohonoho
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.1: E koho i ka inoa no ka honua i mālama ʻia.
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.2: Inā loaʻa kekahi honua me kēia inoa,
swd.tooltip.save_world_to.3: e pani ʻia nā chunks kahiko e nā mea hou.
swd.status.started_saving: > Ke mālama nei i nā chunks...
swd.status.stopped_saving: > Ua kū ka mālama ʻana i nā chunks.
swd.status.villager_trade_saved: > Ua mālama ʻia ka ʻike kālepa kamaʻāina.
swd.status.enderchest_saved: > Ua mālama ʻia ka pahu ender.
swd.status.container_saved: > Ua mālama ʻia ka pahu waiwai.
swd.status.saving_chunk: > Ke mālama nei i ka ʻāpana %s
swd.status.resume_saving: > Hoʻomau i ka mālama ʻana i nā ʻāpana...
swd.status.queue_full: > Piha ka lālani mālama! ʻAʻole i mālama ʻia ʻo &s
swd.status.itemframe_saved: > Mālama ʻia ka mea i loko o ka mōlina mea.
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.1: Hoʻonohonoho inā pono e hoʻomau i ka mālama ʻana
swd.tooltip.resume_downloads.2: inā loaʻa kahi mālama ʻē aʻe no ka honua.
swd.tooltip.auto_download.1: Hoʻonohonoho inā e hoʻoiho ʻia nā honua
swd.tooltip.auto_download.2: ʻokoʻa i ka hui ʻana i ka kikowaena.
swd.tooltip.include_entities.1: Hoʻonohonoho inā e mālama ʻia nā mea
swd.tooltip.include_entities.2: me ka honua i hoʻoiho ʻia.
swd.tooltip.include_player_data.1: Hoʻonohonoho inā e mālama ʻia nā ʻikepili o ka mea pāʻani
swd.tooltip.include_player_data.2: me ka honua i hoʻoiho ʻia.
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.1: Hoʻonohonoho inā e mālama ʻia nā ʻūpena kumu o ka kikowaena
swd.tooltip.include_resource_packs.2: me ka honua i hoʻoiho ʻia.
